issues.description: Condition should check Leader's type, not board presence. Should be 'LeaderHasType' with value 'Whitebeard Pirates', not 'HasCardOnBoard'
Second effect (PowerBoost with Trigger) has no basis in card text. Card only describes a single K.O. effect conditional on Leader type. This entire effect should be removed
Target should specify 'maxCount':1 to match 'up to 1' in text
